subject: Create Loop from the available Loop templates. UI and Backend changes to support creation of Control Loop using a Loop Template. Configuration Policy moodal to support a Dropdown for choosing the Policy variant if a Microservice(loop element model) has more than one associated Policy models. Dropdown uses the acronym field to display as label and value as policy model type.
commit_message:
Create Loop from the available Loop templates.
UI and Backend changes to support creation of Control Loop using a Loop Template.
Configuration Policy moodal to support a Dropdown for choosing the Policy variant if a Microservice(loop element model) has more than one associated Policy models.
Dropdown uses the acronym field to display as label and value as policy model type.

Issue-ID: CLAMP-587
Change-Id: I2028148c94c3f016be13f5836a21a8162face971
Signed-off-by: Ashwin Sharma <ashwin.shyam.sharma@att.com>
